response.step_by_step_log: The video features a single song throughout. On-screen text '仮装狂騒曲' and '#ホロウィッチ' clearly identify the song and event. Search results confirmed the song title is '仮装狂騒曲' (Fancy Dress Party) and the original artist is 'FAKE TYPE.'. The performers are Hololive members (multiple). I searched for '"仮装狂騒曲" FAKE TYPE. Japanese and English lyrics' and successfully retrieved the lyrics.
response.global_summary: A cover of the song '仮装狂騒曲' performed as a medley/group performance by various Hololive VTubers.

scenes.description: A group performance of the song '仮装狂騒曲' by various Hololive members in a virtual stage environment.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あれよという間に飲み込まれる
橙色のタイダルウェーヴ
夜行夜光
ハンドメイドからオーダーメイドまで仕掛ける大流行
本物から偽物までまとめて大集合

[Chorus]
本性露わに暴れよう
その仮装も正装になる
狂騒曲の turntable
あいあい愛おしい高まり
we got the party night!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Swallowed up in the blink of an eye
An orange tidal wave
Nocturnal, luminescent
From handmade to made-to-order, a massive trend
From the real to the fake, a grand gathering

[Chorus]
Let's reveal our true nature and rampage
Even that costume will become formal wear
On the turntable of this rhapsody
Lovely, lovely, lovely excitement
We got the party night!
